specialists.description: Deep security analysis: cryptographic implementations, consensus safety, proof system soundness, race conditions in concurrent code, trust boundary violations, unsafe operations, timing attacks

Rust quality review: error handling discipline (no unwraps in production), architectural patterns, idiomatic Rust usage, proper lifetimes/generics, test structure, performance patterns (unnecessary clones, allocation in hot paths)
FFI and cross-language boundary review: memory safety across Swift/Rust/WASM boundaries, correct ownership transfer, FFI-safe types, panic safety across FFI, WASM binding correctness, ABI stability
